overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a warrior character exploring an ancient Egyptian temple complex. The character ascends exterior stairs, enters a grand hall featuring a colossal statue, then exits to an outdoor courtyard with other NPCs present.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple exterior stairs and entrance platform

events.description: character approaches and enters the large dark temple doorway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily up the wide stone stairs toward the temple entrance

entered.detail: wide marble steps leading up to the temple entrance
tall cylindrical column with red base and stone capital
tall cylindrical column with red base
large dark rectangular doorway with stone frame
carved stone relief depicting figures along the building facade

segments.scene_description: The character approaches an ancient temple, walking up wide marble stairs flanked by large red columns. The exterior is brightly lit by afternoon sun, with carved stone friezes visible on the walls. The character moves toward and enters the large dark doorway.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark entry corridor with red walls

events.description: lighting shifts dramatically from bright outdoor sun to dim interior shadows
bright light becomes visible at the end of the dark corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow dimly lit corridor toward the light at the far end

entered.detail: narrow passage with deep red painted walls and patterned carpet
metal torch holders mounted on the corridor walls

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a narrow, dimly lit corridor with deep red walls and patterned carpets. Wall sconces provide minimal lighting as the character walks toward a bright opening at the far end, transitioning from the bright exterior to the shadowy interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand atrium with colossal statue and offerings

events.description: emerges from narrow corridor into vast interior hall with towering statue
character pauses to look up at the giant statue before continuing

agents.ego_description: walking around the atrium observing the giant statue and scattered ceremonial offerings

entered.detail: colossal robed figure holding glowing spheres in outstretched hands
black ceremonial vessels and scattered fruit offerings on the floor
tall stands with burning flames illuminating the hall
ornate ceiling with square recessed panels and decorative elements
large potted palm trees flanking the statue base

segments.scene_description: The character enters a magnificent atrium dominated by a colossal statue of a robed figure holding glowing spheres. The space features red walls, a coffered ceiling, burning torch braziers, and scattered offering pots. The character walks around observing the statue before heading toward a side exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: exit corridor transitioning to exterior colonnade

events.description: leaving the statue hall through side corridor toward exterior
exiting the building into bright daylight causing exposure adjustment

agents.ego_description: walking through the exit corridor and emerging into the exterior courtyard area

notable_agents.action: standing near the courtyard entrance wearing simple clothing

entered.detail: narrow passage with red walls leading out of the temple
open stone-paved area with classical columns and bright sunlight
rectangular water feature reflecting the surrounding columns
row of tall stone columns supporting the roof structure

segments.scene_description: The character exits the statue hall through a narrow corridor, transitioning from torch-lit interior to bright exterior. The scene opens into a courtyard with stone columns, a rectangular pool, and scattered NPCs standing about. The lighting shifts dramatically as the character emerges into the afternoon sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered colonnade walkway with hanging fabrics

events.description: character pushes past an NPC in green clothing who is blocking the path

agents.ego_description: walking along the colonnade and physically pushing past a pedestrian in the way

notable_agents.action: wearing green tunic, standing in the path then pushed aside by the character

entered.detail: white cloth drapes suspended between the colonnade columns
tall palm trees visible at the end of the colonnade walkway

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a covered colonnade with white fabric drapes hanging between stone columns. The character pushes past an NPC in a green tunic who is standing in the way, then continues toward an open area with palm trees visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the bright exterior of an ancient temple, through its shadowy inner sanctums, and back out into a sunlit courtyard. It begins with the character ascending wide marble stairs flanked by red columns under a bright afternoon sun before passing through a dark doorway into a dimly lit corridor of deep red walls and patterned carpets. As the character moves toward a bright opening, the scene expands into a magnificent atrium dominated by a colossal statue holding glowing spheres and illuminated by burning torch braziers. The camera then follows the character through another narrow passage, transitioning from the torch-lit interior back into the dramatic glare of the afternoon sun as it opens into a courtyard with a rectangular pool and scattered NPCs. Finally, the movement continues along a covered colonnade with white fabric drapes, pushing past a figure in a green tunic toward a distant view of palm trees.
